task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the case_info.txt file to retrieve the case number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window or text editor displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/case_info.txt, revealing the case number.

task_completion.description: Agent logs into the ArkCase application as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase web interface is visible, either showing the login screen with 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' entered, or the post-login dashboard.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to and opens the specific FOIA case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase interface displays the case details for 'FOIA Request - Environmental Impact Data - 2026' or the specific case number retrieved from the text file.

task_completion.description: Agent accesses the Fee Waiver section or dialog for the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific tab, module, or popup dialog related to 'Fee Waiver' is open within the ArkCase case view.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the Fee Waiver status to 'Granted'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown menu, radio button, or status field in the Fee Waiver section clearly shows the selected value as 'Granted'.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the required justification and saves the fee waiver decision.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box contains the justification 'Requester is a member of the news media and disclosure is in the public interest.' followed by evidence of saving (e.g., clicking a 'Save' button, a success notification, or the updated case summary showing the granted status and justification).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the ArkCase web interface rather than using terminal API/curl commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (e.g., Chromium/Firefox) navigating the ArkCase application.

integrity.description: Agent performed the task within the actual ArkCase application and did not fake the output in a text editor or local HTML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct ArkCase URL (dev.arkcase.com) and the interface matches a genuine web application.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database queries or backend scripts to alter the case status.
integrity.visual_evidence: The status change and justification entry are visibly performed through the frontend GUI form fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target FOIA case title is 'FOIA Request - Environmental Impact Data - 2026'. The requester is 'Elena Rossi'. The expected fee waiver status is 'GRANTED'. The justification must contain the keywords 'public interest' and 'news media'.
